TITLE: refactor: Extract rendering/overlay + edit-gesture code from image_label.py
LABELS: roadmap, type:refactor, size:L, phase:B-robustness
---
## Context

`widgets/image_label.py` is 1850 lines — the largest file in the codebase — mixing three concerns: (a) canvas painting/overlays, (b) the direct-manipulation edit-gesture state machine (#40 bbox/segmentation handles, #35 keypoint edits), and (c) event dispatch/zoom/pan/tool routing. Upcoming canvas-heavy feature work (video timeline overlays, SAM 3 review rendering) will pile onto this file. This is a **strictly behavior-preserving** split into two new modules with `ImageLabel` keeping dispatch. Optional-but-recommended: do it before any further canvas-touching feature work; it is not a blocker for anything else.

## Current state

`src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/widgets/image_label.py` (1850 lines), verified method map:

**Rendering / overlay (→ extract):** `paintEvent` (`:306`, orchestrates: pixmap → `draw_annotations` → `draw_editing_polygon` → `draw_selection_rect` → SAM overlays → per-tool `handler.paint_overlay` loop `:348-349` → `draw_tool_size_indicator` → `draw_temp_annotations`), `draw_temp_annotations` (`:355`), `draw_tool_size_indicator` (`:423`), `draw_sam_bbox` (`:481`), `draw_selection_rect` (`:490`), `draw_annotations` (`:560`), `_draw_keypoint_annotation` (`:666`), `_draw_selection_overlay` (`:713`), `draw_editing_polygon` (`:741`), `calculate_centroid` (`:774`), helpers `_pen_w` (`:199`), `_overlay_font` (`:203`), class constant `_SELECTION_COLOR` (`:97`).

**Edit-gesture state machine (→ extract):** statics `_bbox_handle_points` (`:1316`), `_resize_bbox` (`:1366`), `_scale_segmentation` (`:1386`), `_translate_segmentation` (`:1400`), `_scale_keypoints` (`:1409`), `_translate_keypoints` (`:1429`), `_sync_bbox_key` (`:1442`); stateful: `_single_selected_shape` (`:1328`), `_live_annotation` (`:1340`), `_bbox_handle_at` (`:1353`), `_begin_shape_edit` (`:1449`), `_update_select_cursor` (`:1477`), `_update_bbox_drag` (`:1495`), `_clamp_edited_shape` (`:1549`), `_commit_bbox_drag` (`:1587`), `_cancel_bbox_drag` (`:1615`); keypoint edits: `_keypoint_at` (`:1635`), `_begin_keypoint_edit` (`:1653`), `_update_keypoint_drag` (`:1664`), `_commit_keypoint_drag` (`:1674`), `_cancel_keypoint_drag` (`:1691`), `_toggle_keypoint_visibility` (`:1701`); state fields `bbox_edit` (`:135`), `editing_keypoint` (`:158`); cursor map `_BBOX_HANDLE_CURSORS` (`:101-106`).

**Stays in ImageLabel:** event dispatch (`mousePressEvent` `:835` — note the dispatch order: pan → sam_points short-circuit → keypoint both-buttons short-circuit → right-click visibility toggle → select-mode branch `:891-921` → tool handler; `mouseMoveEvent` `:928`, `mouseReleaseEvent` `:972`, `mouseDoubleClickEvent` `:1005`, `keyPressEvent` `:1031`, `wheelEvent` `:790`), zoom/pan/offset (`:253-304, 784-834`), selection machinery (`annotation_at` `:1244`, `annotations_in_rect` `:1262`, `_update_selection_drag` `:1281`, `_finish_selection` `:1293`, `_is_select_mode` `:1178`), vertex-edit mode (`start_polygon_edit` `:1719` … `exit_editing_mode` `:1801`), tool-handler registry (`:184-190`), all `pyqtSignal`s (`:56-91`), temp-annotation accept/discard (`:394-421`).

Direct external/test dependencies on the names (must keep working unchanged):
- `tests/unit/test_bbox_edit.py:52,85-100` call `ImageLabel._bbox_handle_points` / `ImageLabel._resize_bbox` as class attributes; `:112,224,252` call `label._begin_shape_edit(...)`.
- `tests/unit/test_keypoint_geometry.py:41,47,54,59` call `ImageLabel._translate_keypoints` / `_scale_keypoints`.
- `tests/integration/test_bbox_edit_controller.py:70-130`, `test_annotation_history.py:172,191`, `test_annotation_table.py:157` call `il._begin_shape_edit(...)`.
- Docs contract: CLAUDE.md pattern table says `_draw_selection_overlay` + `_bbox_handle_at` share `_bbox_handle_points` ("visual == grab") — the shared helper must remain single-sourced after the split.

## Proposed design

Two new modules, composition over inheritance, `ImageLabel` keeps thin delegates so **every existing name on `ImageLabel` keeps working**:

| Concern | New home | ImageLabel keeps |
|---------|----------|------------------|
| painting/overlays | `widgets/canvas_renderer.py::CanvasRenderer` | `paintEvent` orchestration + delegates |
| #40/#35 gesture machine | `widgets/edit_gestures.py::EditGestures` + pure fns | state fields, signals, delegates |
| dispatch/zoom/pan/selection/vertex-edit/tools | — (unchanged) | everything |

1. `widgets/canvas_renderer.py` — `class CanvasRenderer` constructed with the label (`self.label = image_label`); methods take `(painter, ...)` and read state through `self.label` (annotations, zoom_factor, offsets, ui_scale, class_colors/visibility, `_ctx`). Move the rendering methods listed above verbatim (mechanical `self.` → `self.label.` for state reads; `_pen_w`/`_overlay_font` move too since only painters use them). `_SELECTION_COLOR` moves here; `ImageLabel._SELECTION_COLOR` re-exports it (edit gestures also draw with it via handle geometry docs). `paintEvent` stays on `ImageLabel` but its body becomes calls into `self.renderer` (the per-tool `handler.paint_overlay(painter)` loop stays in `paintEvent` — tool handlers are ADR-019 territory, untouched).
2. `widgets/edit_gestures.py` — module-level **pure functions** for the seven statics (`bbox_handle_points`, `resize_bbox`, `scale_segmentation`, `translate_segmentation`, `scale_keypoints`, `translate_keypoints`, `sync_bbox_key`) plus `class EditGestures` for the stateful machine, constructed with the label; owns nothing the controllers read — `bbox_edit` and `editing_keypoint` **stay as attributes on the label** (external code and `reset_annotation_state` `:276` touch them), the class only manipulates them via `self.label.bbox_edit`.
3. `ImageLabel` keeps compatibility delegates: `_bbox_handle_points = staticmethod(edit_gestures.bbox_handle_points)` (same for the other six statics — this preserves `ImageLabel._resize_bbox(...)` test call sites), and one-line methods `def _begin_shape_edit(self, *a, **k): return self._gestures.begin_shape_edit(*a, **k)` etc. for every stateful method listed. Signals stay on `ImageLabel`; `EditGestures` emits via `self.label.bboxEditCommitted.emit()` etc.
4. No behavior changes of any kind: no reordering of the `paintEvent` layer order (`:306-353`), no change to the `mousePressEvent` dispatch order (`:835-926`), no renamed signals, no changed clamping (`_clamp_edited_shape` keeps calling `utils.clamp_*`).

## Implementation steps

1. Branch `refactor/split-image-label`. Record a baseline: `pytest tests/ -v` all green, note the count.
2. Create `edit_gestures.py`: move the seven statics as pure functions first (smallest step); wire the `staticmethod` aliases; run the unit tests (`test_bbox_edit.py`, `test_keypoint_geometry.py`) — green before proceeding.
3. Move the stateful gesture methods into `EditGestures`; add delegates; instantiate `self._gestures = EditGestures(self)` in `__init__` (after state fields exist). Run `test_bbox_edit_controller.py`, `test_annotation_history.py`, `test_keypoint_controller.py`.
4. Create `canvas_renderer.py`; move drawing methods; keep `ImageLabel.draw_annotations`/`_draw_selection_overlay`/etc. as delegates (internal callers like `_update_select_cursor` and docs reference them). Instantiate `self.renderer = CanvasRenderer(self)`.
5. Rewrite `paintEvent` body to call the renderer; visually diff by running the app (`QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen` for CI; a real launch for the manual check).
6. `grep -n "def " widgets/image_label.py | wc -l` sanity: the file should drop well below ~1100 lines; no method should exist in two places except as a one-line delegate.
7. Full suite + smoke (the AST inline-import test in `test_smoke.py` will catch stale relative imports after the module move — ADR-016; run it explicitly).
8. Docs, senior review (ask it to confirm "no functional diff"), PR.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Zero functional change: no signal signatures, no dispatch order, no drawing order, no state-field names on `ImageLabel` changed.
- [ ] All existing tests pass **unmodified** — specifically `tests/unit/test_bbox_edit.py`, `tests/unit/test_keypoint_geometry.py`, `tests/unit/test_canvas_selection.py`, `tests/unit/test_polygon_edit.py`, `tests/unit/test_keypoint_tool.py`, `tests/integration/test_canvas_selection_controller.py`, `tests/integration/test_bbox_edit_controller.py`, `tests/integration/test_keypoint_controller.py`, `tests/integration/test_annotation_history.py`, `tests/integration/test_annotation_table.py`, `tests/integration/test_tool_mode.py`, `tests/integration/test_smoke.py` (incl. the ADR-016 AST inline-import check).
- [ ] `ImageLabel._bbox_handle_points`, `._resize_bbox`, `._scale_keypoints`, `._translate_keypoints`, `._scale_segmentation`, `._translate_segmentation`, `._sync_bbox_key` remain callable as before (class-level statics).
- [ ] `_draw_selection_overlay` and `_bbox_handle_at` still consume one shared handle-geometry function (visual == grab invariant).
- [ ] `image_label.py` shrinks by roughly the moved-method volume (~700+ lines); the two new modules have module docstrings stating what they own and what stays on `ImageLabel`.
- [ ] Manual golden path: draw polygon/rectangle, select, resize via handles, move, keypoint place + drag + right-click visibility toggle, vertex edit (double-click), Esc reverts, Ctrl+Z undoes — all in light **and** dark mode.

## Test plan

No new behavior → no new behavior tests; the suite *is* the safety net:

```
pytest tests/unit/test_bbox_edit.py tests/unit/test_keypoint_geometry.py \
       tests/unit/test_canvas_selection.py tests/unit/test_polygon_edit.py \
       tests/unit/test_keypoint_tool.py \
       tests/integration/test_canvas_selection_controller.py \
       tests/integration/test_bbox_edit_controller.py \
       tests/integration/test_keypoint_controller.py \
       tests/integration/test_annotation_history.py \
       tests/integration/test_annotation_table.py \
       tests/integration/test_tool_mode.py \
       tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v
```
then the full `pytest tests/ -v` (94+ tests). Optionally add one trivial `tests/unit/test_module_split.py` asserting `ImageLabel._resize_bbox is edit_gestures.resize_bbox`-style identity for the seven aliases (locks the compatibility contract).

## Docs to update

- `docs/05_building_block_view.md` — add `widgets/canvas_renderer.py` + `widgets/edit_gestures.py` rows; update the `ImageLabel` responsibility line ("display, zoom/pan, event dispatch" — rendering/gestures now delegated).
- `docs/09_architecture_decisions.md` — new ADR (next free ADR number): "Split ImageLabel into renderer + edit-gesture collaborators (dispatch stays)"; cross-reference ADR-018 (CanvasContext), ADR-019 (tool handlers), ADR-022/023 (the machinery being moved).
- CLAUDE.md project-structure tree — add the two new files under `widgets/`.

## Pitfalls & guardrails

- **ADR-016 inline-import trap:** after any module move, run `tests/integration/test_smoke.py::test_annotator_window_inline_imports_are_resolvable` — a launch that "looks clean" is NOT sufficient; inline imports fail only when the function is called at runtime.
- **Value-equality, never identity** (ADR-022): `_live_annotation` exists because PyQt round-trips UserRole dicts as copies and `image_label.annotations` is a deepcopy — move it untouched; do not "optimize" it to identity checks.
- **Selection rendering contract** (CLAUDE.md): selected masks keep their class colour; the overlay is the class-colour-independent dashed `_SELECTION_COLOR` box + handle squares drawn in a final pass — preserve the pass ordering inside `draw_annotations`.
- **Keypoint invariants** (ADR-029): `_scale_keypoints`/`_translate_keypoints` skip v=0 points so they stay at `(0,0)`; the `kind="kpt"` box edit rides the existing `bbox_edit` machinery and commits via `bboxEditCommitted` → `commit_bbox_edit` — keep names with the `bbox_edit` prefix (= "edit via the bounding-box handles").
- **Undo baselines** (ADR-026): `_begin_shape_edit`/`_begin_keypoint_edit` emit `editBaselineRequested` at gesture start; commits emit the respective `*Committed` signals. Moving the code must not change when these fire (the history dedup depends on it).
- Keep `bbox_edit`, `editing_keypoint`, `selection_*` fields on the **label** — `reset_annotation_state` (`:276`), tool handlers, and tests reach them there.
- Don't touch `widgets/tools/` (ADR-019) or `canvas_context.py` (ADR-018) — out of scope.
- Resist cleanup temptation: no renames, no dead-code deletion, no logic "simplification" in the same PR — behavior-preserving means the diff is moves + delegates only.

## Dependencies

None (not blocked by anything). Strongly recommended to land **before** canvas-touching feature work: {{C2}} (video timeline UI) and {{D3}} (SAM 3 video tracking) will otherwise grow `image_label.py` further.

_Workflow: follow CLAUDE.md — feature branch, run smoke tests (`pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v`), update arc42 docs, run the senior-reviewer agent before the PR._
